arts.ttl: Juric rallies Roma: “I have a strong squad and I’m only focused on beating Athletic Bilbao”
arts.sum: Roma’s new head coach Ivan Juric is gearing up for his European debut as a manager, but his focus remains solely on the upcoming match against Athletic Bilbao. In a pre-match press conference, Juric emphasized his singular goal: “I’m only thinking about winning this game, hoping to give our fans something to cheer about by repeating Sunday’s performance against Udinese. We’re very focused, living day by day to improve. I’m not thinking about anything else.” Juric expressed confidence in his squad’s depth and quality: “After a week in charge of this team, I can say I have a strong roster The post Juric rallies Roma: “I have a strong squad and I’m only focused on beating Athletic Bilbao” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Europa League | Roma v Athletic Bilbao: Match Preview
arts.sum: The UEFA Europa League kicks off its group stage on Thursday as Roma host Athletic Bilbao at the Stadio Olimpico in a highly anticipated clash between two storied clubs. This marks the first ever competitive meeting between the Italian and Spanish sides as they begin their European campaigns. Roma enter this fixture in a state of flux, having recently parted ways with manager Daniele De Rossi after a poor start to their Serie A season. With just 3 points from 4 league matches, the Giallorossi acted swiftly to appoint Croatian coach Ivan Juric last week.
